title: Trump abruptly ends NBC interview after clash over 'rigged election' claim
description: During the interview, the president was repeatedly challenged on several points by the show's presenter Kristen Welker.
content:
US President Donald Trump abruptly walked out of an interview with NBC after being repeatedly challenged on several claims by the show's presenter Kristen Welker.

title: University of Surrey meningitis case confirmed by health chiefs
description: A meningitis case has been confirmed at the University of Surrey, officials say.
content:
A case of meningitis has been confirmed at the University of Surrey, with public health officials providing advice to students.

title: Nuclear jets at risk in defence spending plan
description: Starmer could abandon purchase of stealth fighters amid funding row between MoD and Treasury
content:
Britain’s future fleet of fighter jets capable of dropping nuclear bombs is under threat in Sir Keir Starmer’s Defence Investment Plan (DIP).

title: Singer-songwriter who wrote for Dua Lipa and Britney Spears stabbed to death in London
description: Tributes have poured in to Talay Riley, who died at an address in Silvertown on Friday morning having suffered stab wounds
content:
